beginner.title: There is / There are / There was / There were
beginner.content:
📌 There is / There are – nói về sự tồn tại
Dùng there is / there are để nói rằng một thứ gì đó tồn tại, ở đâu đó, hoặc xảy ra.
• There is + danh từ số ít hoặc không đếm được
 – There is a good restaurant at the end of the street.
 – There is a lot of noise.
• There are + danh từ số nhiều
 – There are some keys in that box.
 – There are a lot of storms in summer.
📌 Dùng với a, some, any
• Khẳng định: There is a new teacher. / There are some problems.
• Phủ định: There isn't any milk. / There aren't any chairs.
• Câu hỏi: Is there a bank near here? / Are there any students?
📌 Danh sách – dùng there is nếu danh từ đầu tiên là số ít
In the room, there is a bed, a wardrobe and two chairs.
(Danh từ đầu tiên 'a bed' là số ít → dùng there is, dù sau đó có số nhiều)
📌 Quá khứ: There was / There were
• There was a car in the street. → Trước đây có một chiếc xe.
• There were many people at the party. → Có nhiều người ở buổi tiệc.
• Phủ định: There wasn't any food. / There weren't any seats.
• Câu hỏi: Was there a problem? / Were there any students?
⚠️ Lỗi thường gặp
❌ It is a bank near here. → ✅ There is a bank near here.
❌ There is some chairs. → ✅ There are some chairs.
❌ Are there a problem? → ✅ Is there a problem?
❌ There were a big crowd. → ✅ There was a big crowd.
There is a concert tonight.Tối nay có một buổi hòa nhạc.
There are some problems that we need to solve.Có một số vấn đề chúng ta cần giải quyết.
There was a lot of traffic on the road yesterday.Hôm qua có rất nhiều xe cộ trên đường.

exercises.q: ___ a good restaurant near my office.
exercises.exp: Số ít 'a restaurant' → There is

exercises.q: ___ some students in the classroom.
exercises.exp: Số nhiều 'some students' → There are

exercises.q: Is ___ a bank near here?
exercises.exp: Câu hỏi → Is there a ...?

exercises.q: ___ any milk in the fridge? – No, there isn't.
exercises.exp: milk (không đếm được) → Is there any milk?

exercises.q: ___ a lot of noise outside last night.
exercises.exp: Quá khứ, không đếm được → There was

exercises.q: ___ many people at the party yesterday.
exercises.exp: Quá khứ số nhiều → There were

exercises.q: There ___ any seats left. The hall is full.
exercises.exp: Số nhiều 'seats', hiện tại → aren't

exercises.q: In my bag ___ a pen, a notebook and some coins.
exercises.exp: Danh từ đầu tiên 'a pen' là số ít → there is

exercises.q: ___ a concert tomorrow evening.
exercises.exp: Sự kiện sắp diễn ra, số ít → There is

exercises.q: Were ___ any problems during the trip?
exercises.exp: Were there any ...? – câu hỏi quá khứ

exercises.q: ___ a lot of storms in summer in this region.
exercises.exp: Số nhiều (storms), hiện tại → There are

exercises.q: ___ wasn't ___ food at the party.
exercises.exp: Phủ định quá khứ → There wasn't any food

exercises.q: Excuse me, ___ a post office near here?
exercises.exp: Câu hỏi số ít → is there a ...?

exercises.q: ___ a new student in our class today.
exercises.exp: Số ít 'a new student' → There is

exercises.q: ___ a bed, a desk and two chairs in the room.
exercises.exp: Danh từ đầu tiên 'a bed' số ít → There is

exercises.q: ___ many cars in the streets in the 1950s?
exercises.exp: Quá khứ số nhiều → Were there ...?

exercises.q: ___ any good news today?
exercises.exp: 'news' không đếm được → Is there any news?

exercises.q: ___ a huge fire in the city centre last night.
exercises.exp: Quá khứ số ít → There was

exercises.q: How many rooms ___ in your house?
exercises.exp: Câu hỏi số nhiều → are there

exercises.q: ___ some great shops on the high street.
exercises.exp: Số nhiều 'some great shops' → There are

exercises.q: ___ a supermarket near my house. (There is/There are)
exercises.exp: Số ít 'a supermarket' → There is

exercises.q: ___ thirty students in our class. (There is/There are)
exercises.exp: Số nhiều '30 students' → There are

exercises.q: ___ a problem with the computer. (There is/There was)
exercises.exp: Hiện tại, số ít → There is

exercises.q: ___ a lot of people at the market this morning. (There was/There were)
exercises.exp: Quá khứ, số nhiều → There were

exercises.q: Is ___ a gym in this building? (there/they)
exercises.exp: Câu hỏi → Is there a ...?

exercises.q: ___ any chairs available? – Yes, there are some. (Is there/Are there)
exercises.exp: Số nhiều → Are there any ...?

exercises.q: ___ isn't ___ milk left. We need to buy some. (There/It + any/some)
exercises.exp: Phủ định → There isn't any milk

exercises.q: How many pages ___ in this book? (is there/are there)
exercises.exp: Số nhiều 'pages' → are there

exercises.q: ___ a big storm last night. (There was/There were)
exercises.exp: Quá khứ, số ít → There was

exercises.q: ___ a pen, two books and a ruler on the desk. (There is/There are)
exercises.exp: Danh từ đầu tiên 'a pen' số ít → There is

exercises.q: ___ wasn't any food at the party. (There/It)
exercises.exp: There wasn't any food

exercises.q: ___ a new café on my street. Have you tried it? (There is/There are)
exercises.exp: Số ít 'a new café' → There is

exercises.q: ___ any interesting films on TV tonight? (Is there/Are there)
exercises.exp: Số nhiều 'films' → Are there any ...?

exercises.q: ___ a hundred years ago, ___ no cars or phones. (There was/There were)
exercises.exp: Quá khứ, nói về things (số nhiều ngầm) → There were

exercises.q: ___ a lot of homework today! I'm so tired. (There is/There are)
exercises.exp: 'homework' không đếm được → There is

exercises.q: Were ___ any problems with the project? (there/they)
exercises.exp: Were there any problems?

exercises.q: ___ some beautiful parks in this city. (There is/There are)
exercises.exp: Số nhiều 'parks' → There are

exercises.q: ___ a strange noise outside. Did you hear it? (There was/There were)
exercises.exp: Quá khứ số ít 'a noise' → There was

exercises.q: Excuse me, ___ a bus stop near here? (is there/are there)
exercises.exp: Số ít → is there a ...?

exercises.q: ___ many tourists here in summer. (There are/There is)
exercises.exp: Số nhiều 'many tourists' → There are

reorder.words: There is a good restaurant at the end of the street
There are some keys in that box
Is there a bank near here
There was a big crowd at the stadium
There were many people at the party last night
There isn't any milk in the fridge
Are there any good seats left for the concert
In my room there is a bed a desk and a wardrobe
How many students are there in your class
There is a lot of noise outside tonight
Was there a problem with the machine
There are some beautiful parks in this city
There weren't any chairs in the room
Is there a post office near the station
There was a storm last night and it was very loud
There are thirty students in our English class
Were there any interesting shops in the old market
There is a concert at the park this weekend
There was a car accident near the school yesterday
There are a lot of storms in summer in this region

passage.text: My neighbourhood is very lively. {{1}} a big market near my house. {{2}} many stalls and {{3}} a lot of fresh food. Every morning {{4}} many people shopping there. {{5}} a small park next to the market where children play. In the park {{6}} some benches and a fountain. {{7}} a café on the corner too. Last year {{8}} only one café, but now {{9}} three. {{10}} also a new library that opened last month.

Last summer I visited a small village in the mountains. {{1}} a river running through the middle of the village. {{2}} a bridge over the river and {{3}} some boats by the bank. {{4}} many old houses with red roofs. At night {{5}} a lot of stars in the sky because {{6}} no city lights. {{7}} a small market on Saturday mornings. {{8}} fresh vegetables, fruit and homemade bread for sale. {{9}} any large shops or supermarkets — just local stalls. I loved it. {{10}} something magical about that place.

I'm looking for a new flat. {{1}} some apartments for rent in my area. {{2}} a nice one on Oak Street. {{3}} two bedrooms and a living room. {{4}} a balcony with a great view. {{5}} any parking spaces? Yes, {{6}} one space included. {{7}} a gym in the building? Unfortunately, {{8}} one, but {{9}} a gym nearby. {{10}} also a supermarket and a bus stop just five minutes away.

Our school is quite big. {{1}} over eight hundred students. {{2}} twenty classrooms on three floors. {{3}} a large sports hall and {{4}} a swimming pool outside. {{5}} a canteen where students can buy lunch. {{6}} a library with thousands of books. Last year {{7}} only one computer lab, but now {{8}} three. {{9}} a new science building under construction too. {{10}} any after-school clubs? Yes, {{11}} many — from football to art to drama.

Yesterday I went to a new shopping centre. {{1}} a huge car park outside. {{2}} hundreds of shops on four floors. {{3}} a food court on the top floor with many restaurants. {{4}} a cinema too! {{5}} any good films on? Yes, {{6}} three new releases. Inside the food court {{7}} a sushi restaurant, a pizza place and a Vietnamese noodle bar. {{8}} long queues at the noodle bar because the food was so good. At the exit {{9}} a small market selling flowers and gifts. {{10}} a great day.

writing_prompts.vi: Mô tả căn phòng hoặc ngôi nhà của bạn
writing_prompts.example: In my room there is a bed and a desk. There are some books on the shelf. There isn't a wardrobe but there is a big cupboard.

writing_prompts.vi: Kể về khu phố hoặc làng của bạn
writing_prompts.grammar_focus: There is / There are / There was / There were
writing_prompts.example: There is a big market near my house. There are many shops and restaurants. There was an old temple here but it is gone now.

writing_prompts.vi: Mô tả trường học của bạn
writing_prompts.example: My school is large. There are twenty classrooms and a big sports ground. There is a library and a canteen. There aren't any swimming pools.

writing_prompts.vi: Viết email hỏi về một căn hộ cho thuê
writing_prompts.example: I am interested in the flat. Is there a balcony? Are there any parking spaces? Is there a washing machine? Are there any good shops nearby?

writing_prompts.vi: So sánh thị trấn của bạn bây giờ và ngày xưa
writing_prompts.example: Now there are many new buildings in my town. There is a shopping centre. But before, there was only one small market and there weren't any restaurants.

beginner.title: There or It
beginner.content:
📌 THERE – nói về sự tồn tại, vị trí, thời gian
Dùng there để nói một thứ gì đó tồn tại hoặc đang xảy ra.
• There are some dirty cups on the table.
• There is a party tomorrow.
• There was an accident.
⚠️ Dùng there lần đầu nhắc đến một thứ. Lần sau dùng it hoặc they.
– There are some cups on the table. But they are dirty.
– There was an accident. It was horrible.
📌 IT – nói về thứ đã biết, thời tiết, thời gian
Dùng it để:
• Nhắc lại thứ đã đề cập: There is a party tomorrow. It will be fantastic!
• Nói về thời tiết: It's very windy. It's a nice day.
• Nói về thời gian / ngày tháng: It's four o'clock. It's my mum's birthday today. It's very late.
• Nói về khoảng cách: It's 5 km from here.
📌 Bảng so sánh nhanh
Tình huốngDùngVí dụ
Giới thiệu lần đầuThere is/areThere is a dog outside.
Nhắc lạiItIt is very big.
Thời tiếtItIt's raining.
Thời gianItIt's 7 o'clock.
Sự kiện tồn tại/xảy raThere is/areThere is a problem.
⚠️ Lỗi thường gặp
❌ It is a party tomorrow. → ✅ There is a party tomorrow.
❌ There is raining. → ✅ It is raining.
❌ There is 8 o'clock. → ✅ It is 8 o'clock.
❌ There is a dog. There is very big. → ✅ There is a dog. It is very big.
There is a party tomorrow. It will be fantastic!Ngày mai có buổi tiệc. Nó sẽ rất tuyệt!
It's very windy today.Hôm nay trời rất nhiều gió.
There was an accident. It was horrible.Có một vụ tai nạn. Nó thật kinh khủng.

exercises.q: ___ raining heavily outside. Take an umbrella.
exercises.exp: Thời tiết → It's raining

exercises.q: ___ a new student in our class today.
exercises.exp: Giới thiệu lần đầu → There is

exercises.q: I saw a snake in the garden. ___ was huge!
exercises.exp: Nhắc lại thứ đã nhắc → It

exercises.q: ___ seven o'clock. Time to wake up!
exercises.exp: Thời gian → It's

exercises.q: ___ a problem with the internet connection.
exercises.exp: Giới thiệu vấn đề → There is a problem

exercises.q: We found a café near the hotel. ___ was very cosy.
exercises.exp: Nhắc lại 'a café' → It

exercises.q: ___ sunny and warm this afternoon.
exercises.exp: Thời tiết → It's

exercises.q: ___ some birds in the tree. ___ are singing beautifully.
exercises.opts: There are / They,It is / They,There are / It,It is / It
exercises.exp: Giới thiệu → There are; nhắc lại số nhiều → They

exercises.q: ___ 5 km from the station to the hotel.
exercises.exp: Khoảng cách → It's

exercises.q: ___ a concert on Friday. ___ will start at 8 pm.
exercises.opts: There is / It,It is / It,There is / There,It is / There
exercises.exp: Giới thiệu → There is; nhắc lại → It

exercises.q: ___ cold today. Don't forget your coat.
exercises.exp: Thời tiết → It's cold

exercises.q: ___ a dog barking outside. ___ sounds scared.
exercises.opts: There is / It,It is / It,There is / There,It is / There
exercises.exp: Giới thiệu → There is; nhắc lại → It

exercises.q: ___ my mum's birthday today. We're having a party.
exercises.exp: Ngày đặc biệt → It's

exercises.q: ___ any news about the accident?
exercises.exp: Câu hỏi về sự tồn tại → Is there any news?

exercises.q: ___ a fantastic view from the top of the hill. ___ was unforgettable.
exercises.opts: There was / It,It was / It,There was / There,It was / There
exercises.exp: Giới thiệu → There was; nhắc lại → It

exercises.q: ___ getting dark. We should go home.
exercises.exp: Thời tiết/môi trường → It's getting dark

exercises.q: ___ a letter for you on the table.
exercises.exp: Giới thiệu lần đầu → There is

exercises.q: We saw a film last night. ___ was really funny.
exercises.exp: Nhắc lại 'a film' → It

exercises.q: ___ no point in waiting. The bus won't come.
exercises.exp: 'There is no point' = cụm cố định

exercises.q: ___ a lot of traffic this morning. ___ was terrible.
exercises.opts: There was / It,It was / It,There was / There,It was / There
exercises.exp: Giới thiệu → There was; nhắc lại → It

exercises.q: ___ a big supermarket near my flat. (There is/It is)
exercises.exp: Giới thiệu lần đầu → There is

exercises.q: ___ very cold outside today. Put on a jacket. (It's/There's)
exercises.exp: Thời tiết → It's

exercises.q: I found a great book. ___ is about history. (It/There)
exercises.exp: Nhắc lại 'a great book' → It

exercises.q: ___ a traffic jam on the main road. (There is/It is)
exercises.exp: Giới thiệu → There is a traffic jam

exercises.q: ___ half past nine. Time for bed! (It's/There's)
exercises.exp: Thời gian → It's

exercises.q: We found a new café. ___ was really nice. (It/There)
exercises.exp: Nhắc lại 'a café' → It

exercises.q: ___ some people waiting outside. (There are/It is)
exercises.exp: Giới thiệu số nhiều → There are

exercises.q: ___ about 10 km from the city to the beach. (It's/There's)
exercises.exp: Khoảng cách → It's

exercises.q: ___ a fire! Call the fire brigade! (There is/It is)
exercises.exp: Giới thiệu sự kiện → There is

exercises.q: We went to a new restaurant. ___ was wonderful. (It/There)
exercises.exp: Nhắc lại 'a restaurant' → It

exercises.q: ___ windy and cloudy this morning. (It's/There's)
exercises.exp: Thời tiết → It's

exercises.q: ___ a new park in our neighbourhood. (There is/It is)
exercises.exp: Giới thiệu → There is

exercises.q: I got a new phone. ___ is very fast. (It/There)
exercises.exp: Nhắc lại 'a phone' → It

exercises.q: ___ a concert next Saturday. ___ starts at 7 pm. (There is/It)
exercises.exp: Giới thiệu → There is; nhắc lại → It

exercises.q: ___ Tuesday today. We have English class. (It's/There's)
exercises.exp: Ngày trong tuần → It's

exercises.q: ___ any seats left? (Is there/Is it)
exercises.exp: Câu hỏi → Is there any ...?

exercises.q: We watched a documentary. ___ was about climate change. (It/There)
exercises.exp: Nhắc lại 'a documentary' → It

exercises.q: ___ a lot of homework tonight! (There is/It is)
exercises.exp: Giới thiệu sự việc → There is

exercises.q: ___ important to drink enough water every day. (It's/There's)
exercises.exp: It's + adjective = quan trọng, thú vị...

exercises.q: ___ a lovely garden behind the house. ___ has beautiful roses. (There is/It)
exercises.exp: Giới thiệu → There is; nhắc lại → It

reorder.words: There is a party on Friday and it will be great
It is raining so take an umbrella with you
There was an accident and it was very serious
It is seven o'clock and time to get up
There is a dog outside and it looks friendly
It is cold today so wear a warm coat
There are some students in the hall and they are waiting
It is ten kilometres from here to the city centre
There is a new café on my street and it is very popular
It is my birthday today and there is a cake for me
There was a noise outside and it scared me
It is getting dark so let us go home now
There are some problems with the plan and we need to fix them
We saw a film last night and it was really funny
There is no point in worrying because it will be fine
It is sunny and warm today so let us go to the park
There was a concert yesterday and it was amazing
It is important to study every day
There is a letter for you on the table
It is half past eight and there is no time to lose

passage.text: I woke up this morning and looked outside. {{1}} raining heavily. {{2}} dark clouds in the sky. {{3}} looked like a storm was coming. {{4}} a strong wind too. {{5}} about seven o'clock when I got up. {{6}} no point going for a run, so I stayed inside. {{7}} a good book on my shelf. {{8}} about a traveller in South America. I read for an hour. Then {{9}} some noise outside. {{10}} came from a cat on the roof. {{11}} not raining any more. {{12}} still cold, though. {{13}} my brother's birthday today, so we are having a small party tonight. {{14}} at our house. {{15}} going to be great!

Last weekend I visited a new shopping centre. {{1}} a huge building in the city centre. {{2}} five floors and hundreds of shops. {{3}} very crowded when we arrived. {{4}} Saturday afternoon, so {{5}} a lot of people everywhere. {{6}} a food court on the top floor. {{7}} many different restaurants. We chose a Vietnamese place. {{8}} delicious! {{9}} a long queue but {{10}} moved quickly. After lunch {{11}} time to explore the shops. {{12}} a sale in most of them. {{13}} a great day out.

My friend told me about a new café yesterday. {{1}} on the corner of Park Street and Green Lane. {{2}} a lovely little place with wooden tables and plants everywhere. {{3}} quite busy when we arrived. {{4}} around lunchtime. {{5}} a long menu with many choices. I ordered a sandwich and a coffee. {{6}} delicious! {{7}} soft music playing too. {{8}} very relaxing. {{9}} a small garden at the back. {{10}} open in the evenings as well. I will definitely go back.

I want to tell you about my village. {{1}} a small village in the north of Vietnam. {{2}} about two hundred families living here. {{3}} a river that runs through the middle. {{4}} very beautiful in the morning when there is mist on the water. {{5}} a market every Sunday morning. {{6}} always very lively. {{7}} stalls selling vegetables, fish and handmade goods. {{8}} not a supermarket here, but {{9}} one in the next town. {{10}} twenty minutes by bus from my village. {{11}} some new houses being built near the river. {{12}} good for the community.

Yesterday evening was really special. {{1}} a big surprise party for my sister's birthday. {{2}} at our cousin's house. Everybody came! {{3}} about thirty people in total. {{4}} food and drinks everywhere. {{5}} a big cake with candles on the table. {{6}} so beautiful! My sister arrived at eight o'clock. {{7}} completely surprised. {{8}} happy tears in her eyes! {{9}} some live music too. {{10}} played very well. {{11}} a wonderful atmosphere. {{12}} past midnight when we finally went home. {{13}} a night I will never forget. {{14}} was truly magical.

writing_prompts.vi: Viết về thời tiết hôm nay và kế hoạch của bạn
writing_prompts.example: It's sunny today. It's warm and there is a light wind. There is a park near my house so I will go for a walk.

writing_prompts.vi: Kể về một sự kiện gần đây (tiệc, buổi hoà nhạc, chuyến đi)
writing_prompts.example: Last night there was a party at my friend's house. There were about twenty people. It was very loud and fun. There was a lot of food and music. It finished late.

writing_prompts.vi: Mô tả thành phố hoặc làng của bạn
writing_prompts.example: I live in a small town. There is a market and a park. There are many cafés. It is quiet and peaceful. There isn't a cinema but it is a lovely place.

writing_prompts.vi: Viết về một bộ phim hoặc cuốn sách bạn đọc/xem gần đây
writing_prompts.example: I watched a great film last night. There was a hero and a villain. It was very exciting. There were many action scenes. It made me very happy.

writing_prompts.vi: Mô tả buổi sáng của bạn hôm nay
writing_prompts.example: This morning it was cold and dark. There was a lot of traffic. It was already eight o'clock when I left home. There was no time for breakfast. It was a stressful morning!

beginner.title: The difference between 'this' and 'it'
beginner.content:
📌 THIS – giới thiệu / chỉ thứ gần mình
• Dùng this để chỉ thứ gì đó ở gần bạn (như chỉ ngón tay).
 – This cat is cute. (con mèo đang ở đây, trước mắt bạn)
 – This is my house. (ngôi nhà trước mặt bạn)
 – I think this jacket is perfect for you.
• Dùng this để giới thiệu người với người khác, hoặc tự giới thiệu qua điện thoại.
 – This is my brother John.
 – Hello, this is Linda. (qua điện thoại)
• Số nhiều của this là these.
 – These are my brothers, John and Edward.
📌 IT – nhắc lại / thứ đã biết
• Dùng it để nói về thứ đã được đề cập hoặc cả hai đều đã biết.
 – This cat is cute. It is sleeping. (it = the cat)
 – This is my house. I bought it last year.
• it là đại từ giống như he / she nhưng dùng cho đồ vật và động vật.
• Không dùng it để giới thiệu người (dùng he/she).
📌 Bảng so sánh
THISIT
Giới thiệu lần đầuNhắc lại lần thứ hai
Chỉ vào thứ gần mìnhThay thế danh từ đã biết
Giới thiệu người / qua điện thoạiKhông dùng để giới thiệu người
This is a great idea!It is a great idea! (đã nhắc trước)
⚠️ Lỗi thường gặp
❌ It is my friend Tom. (giới thiệu lần đầu) → ✅ This is my friend Tom.
❌ I have a new phone. This is very fast. → ✅ I have a new phone. It is very fast.
❌ This is sleeping. (chỉ con mèo đã biết) → ✅ It is sleeping.
This cat is cute. It is sleeping.Con mèo này dễ thương. Nó đang ngủ.
This is my brother John. He is a doctor.Đây là anh trai tôi, John. Anh ấy là bác sĩ.
I love this song! It always makes me happy.Tôi yêu bài hát này! Nó luôn làm tôi vui.

exercises.q: ___ is my new bicycle. I bought ___ last week.
exercises.exp: Giới thiệu → This; nhắc lại → it

exercises.q: Hello, ___ is Tom. Can I speak to Anna?
exercises.exp: Tự giới thiệu qua điện thoại → this

exercises.q: I have a new book. ___ is very interesting.
exercises.exp: Nhắc lại 'a new book' → It

exercises.q: Look! ___ dog is so cute! ___ is wagging its tail.
exercises.exp: Chỉ con chó gần mình → This; nhắc lại → It

exercises.q: We visited a museum yesterday. ___ was really fascinating.
exercises.exp: Nhắc lại 'a museum' → It

exercises.q: ___ is my friend Hoa. ___ is a nurse.
exercises.exp: Giới thiệu người → This; người thì dùng She

exercises.q: I love ___ jacket. Where did you buy ___?
exercises.exp: Chỉ vào áo gần → this; nhắc lại → it

exercises.q: I saw a great film last night. ___ was about space travel.
exercises.exp: Nhắc lại 'a great film' → It

exercises.q: ___ is Anna speaking. I'm calling about the meeting.
exercises.exp: Tự giới thiệu qua điện thoại → This

exercises.q: She gave me a gift. ___ was a beautiful scarf.
exercises.exp: Nhắc lại 'a gift' → It

exercises.q: Can you see ___ mountain over there? ___ is very tall.
exercises.exp: Chỉ vật xa → that; nhắc lại → It

exercises.q: I found a great recipe. ___ is very easy to make.
exercises.exp: Nhắc lại 'a great recipe' → It

exercises.q: ___ is my new phone. ___ has an amazing camera.
exercises.exp: Giới thiệu → This; nhắc lại → It

exercises.q: We tried a new restaurant. ___ was expensive but delicious.
exercises.exp: Nhắc lại 'a new restaurant' → It

exercises.q: Hello? ___ is the receptionist. How can I help you?
exercises.exp: Tự giới thiệu qua điện thoại → This

exercises.q: ___ is a beautiful day, isn't ___?
exercises.exp: Nhận xét hôm nay → This; nhắc lại → it

exercises.q: I read a newspaper article. ___ was about climate change.
exercises.exp: Nhắc lại 'a newspaper article' → It

exercises.q: ___ jacket here is really warm. I wear ___ every winter.
exercises.exp: Chỉ áo gần → This; nhắc lại → it

exercises.q: My friend told me about a new park. ___ is near the lake.
exercises.exp: Nhắc lại 'a new park' (thứ đã được đề cập) → It

exercises.q: ___ is the best meal I've ever had. I loved every bite of ___!
exercises.exp: Đang ăn bữa đó ngay bây giờ → This; nhắc lại → it

exercises.q: ___ is my sister Lan. ___ is a teacher. (This/It + She/It)
exercises.exp: Giới thiệu người → This; người dùng She

exercises.q: I bought a new laptop. ___ is very fast. (This/It)
exercises.exp: Nhắc lại 'a new laptop' → It

exercises.q: ___ is my new school. I love ___. (This/It + it/this)
exercises.exp: Giới thiệu → This; nhắc lại → it

exercises.q: She gave me a flower. ___ was a red rose. (It/This)
exercises.exp: Nhắc lại 'a flower' → It

exercises.q: Hello, ___ is Dr Minh from the City Hospital. (this/it)
exercises.exp: Tự giới thiệu qua điện thoại → this

exercises.q: Look at ___ painting! ___ is incredible. (this/it + It/This)
exercises.exp: Chỉ bức tranh gần → this; nhắc lại → It

exercises.q: I watched a documentary. ___ was about ocean pollution. (It/This)
exercises.exp: Nhắc lại 'a documentary' → It

exercises.q: ___ is a great song! I listen to ___ every morning. (This/It + it/this)
exercises.exp: Đang nghe bài đó → This; nhắc lại → it

exercises.q: My dad found an old photo. ___ showed our whole family. (It/This)
exercises.exp: Nhắc lại 'an old photo' → It

exercises.q: ___ is my friend Nam. ___ plays football for the school team. (This/It + He/It)
exercises.exp: Giới thiệu người → This; người dùng He

exercises.q: I cooked a new dish today. ___ was a bit too salty. (It/This)
exercises.exp: Nhắc lại 'a new dish' → It

exercises.q: ___ bag here is mine. Can I have ___? (This/It + it/this)
exercises.exp: Chỉ túi gần → This; nhắc lại → it

exercises.q: She told me a funny story. ___ made me laugh a lot. (It/This)
exercises.exp: Nhắc lại 'a funny story' → It

exercises.q: ___ is a beautiful garden. ___ has many colourful flowers. (This/It + It/This)
exercises.exp: Giới thiệu → This; nhắc lại → It

exercises.q: We found a stray cat. ___ was very thin and hungry. (It/This)
exercises.exp: Nhắc lại 'a stray cat' → It

exercises.q: Hi, ___ is Lan from accounting. Is Mr. Minh available? (this/it)
exercises.exp: Tự giới thiệu qua điện thoại → this

exercises.q: I love ___ café. ___ has the best coffee in town. (this/it + It/This)
exercises.exp: Chỉ quán gần → this; nhắc lại → It

exercises.q: My teacher showed us a video. ___ was very educational. (It/This)
exercises.exp: Nhắc lại 'a video' → It

exercises.q: ___ is my new flat. ___ is small but comfortable. (This/It + It/This)
exercises.exp: Giới thiệu → This; nhắc lại → It

exercises.q: I tried a new sport last weekend. ___ was really exciting. (It/This)
exercises.exp: Nhắc lại 'a new sport' → It

reorder.words: This is my new phone and it has a great camera
This is my friend Tom and he is very funny
I bought a new book and it is very interesting
Hello this is Anna speaking how can I help you
Look at this painting it is absolutely beautiful
She gave me a gift and it was a lovely scarf
This jacket is very warm and I wear it every winter
I tried a new restaurant last night and it was delicious
This is my sister and she is a doctor
We watched a film and it was really exciting
This bag is mine and I bought it in Paris
I read a great article and it was about space
This is a lovely garden and it has many flowers
My dad bought a new car and it is very fast
This is my favourite song and I listen to it every day
She told me a funny story and it made me laugh
This is the best meal I have ever eaten
I found a stray cat and it was very hungry
This is my new school and I love it very much
Hi this is Dr Minh from the City Hospital

passage.text: I want to show you my new room. {{1}} is quite small but {{2}} is very cosy. {{3}} is my desk near the window. I study at {{4}} every evening. {{5}} is my favourite chair. {{6}} is very comfortable. Look at {{7}} poster on the wall. {{8}} is of my favourite band. They came to my city last year. {{9}} was an amazing concert. I recorded some videos. {{10}} were not very clear but {{11}} was still a great memory. {{12}} is my bookshelf. {{13}} has about fifty books on {{14}}. {{15}} is my favourite — a story about a young explorer.

Yesterday I went to a new bookshop. {{1}} was near the old market. {{2}} is a small place but {{3}} has a huge selection. I found an interesting book about photography. {{4}} was really well written. I also found a cookbook. {{5}} had beautiful photos inside {{6}}. I bought both. The cashier was very friendly. {{7}} is the owner's daughter. She told me {{8}} is her favourite bookshop in the city. She gave me a loyalty card. {{9}} gives me a ten-percent discount next time. I love {{10}} shop. I will go back soon.

Let me introduce my family. {{1}} is my father. {{2}} is a chef and works at a big hotel. {{3}} is my mother. {{4}} is a nurse. {{5}} is my little sister Bao. {{6}} is only five years old. {{7}} is our dog Rex. {{8}} is a golden retriever. {{9}} loves to run in the garden. We have a garden behind our house. {{10}} is quite big. {{11}} has many fruit trees and flowers. My mother planted most of {{12}}. I love our garden. I think {{13}} is the best place to relax.

I want to tell you about my new hobby: photography. {{1}} started about six months ago. My uncle gave me his old camera. {{2}} is a classic film camera. {{3}} is quite heavy but {{4}} takes wonderful photos. I took {{5}} to the park last weekend. The light was perfect. I took photos of flowers and birds. {{6}} turned out beautifully. I showed my photos to my teacher. {{7}} said {{8}} was impressed. {{9}} told me to enter a school competition. {{10}} is in two weeks. I am nervous but excited. I think {{11}} will be a great experience.

Hi Lan! I want to tell you about my new neighbourhood. {{1}} is very different from our old street. {{2}} is much quieter and greener. {{3}} is a lovely park just two minutes from my house. {{4}} has a pond and some ducks. {{5}} are very friendly — they come right up to you! There is also a bakery near the park. {{6}} opens early every morning. {{7}} smells amazing when you walk past {{8}}! I went in yesterday. The baker showed me a special loaf. {{9}} was still warm from the oven. {{10}} is perfect with butter. You should visit me soon!

writing_prompts.vi: Giới thiệu phòng của bạn hoặc một đồ vật yêu thích
writing_prompts.grammar_focus: This is (giới thiệu) → It is (nhắc lại)
writing_prompts.example: This is my desk. It is near the window. I use it every day for studying. This is my lamp. It is very bright and useful.

writing_prompts.vi: Giới thiệu thành viên trong gia đình
writing_prompts.grammar_focus: This is (giới thiệu người) + he/she (nhắc lại)
writing_prompts.example: This is my brother Nam. He is eighteen years old. He is a student. This is my mum. She is a teacher. She is very kind.

writing_prompts.vi: Kể về một thứ bạn mua gần đây
writing_prompts.grammar_focus: This is (giới thiệu) + It is / I use it (nhắc lại)
writing_prompts.example: Last week I bought a new bag. This is it. It is dark blue and quite big. It has many pockets. I use it for school every day. It was not expensive.

writing_prompts.vi: Viết về một bài hát, bộ phim hoặc cuốn sách yêu thích
writing_prompts.example: This is my favourite film. It is called La La Land. It is about music and love. It is very beautiful. It makes me feel happy every time I watch it.

writing_prompts.vi: Viết tin nhắn giới thiệu mình qua điện thoại hoặc email
writing_prompts.example: Hello, this is Minh from class 7B. I am calling about the homework. It is quite difficult. It would be great if you could help me. Is it a good time to talk?
